name: Rocky Mayhem
short_description: Systems are down and require time to repair, leaving you with a basic gunship with no hopes of escaping an aggressive asteroid event. Will you be able to survive the increasingly difficult 8 minutes to repair the ship's functions and escape? Also discover a variety of genres, all in one game!
detailed_description:
Fight for survival in an asteroid field

Rocky Mayhem is a rogue-like survival heavily inspired by the 'Asteroids' game. You play as a pilot, stranded in a mysterious area of space where asteroids try and hit you at every attempt they can, and flying away loops you back to where you once were. The aim of the game is to survive a full 8 minutes while the ship self-repairs all functions before it can escape the asteroid field.

Will you be able to survive the harsh environment of space and escape before your ship is blown to smithereens?

Take on sentient gods

Throughout your experience on Rocky Mayhem, you will encounter the 3 Deities of Mayhem. You must take them all on to earn freedom of the asteroid field and the intergalactic police once and for all. Face Volcanic and Frozen in Classic mode, and prepare yourself for the final showdown with the Reality Deity.

Play various other modes!

Along with the main game comes Arcade. A small selection of minigames with different objectives. Fight against the intergalactic police or take a chill search in a maze of tunnels for a stranded drillship. With constant updates to these minigames, there's nothing that you won't enjoy. 

Current modes include:

  • Most Wanted

  • Rescue Operations

  • Excavation

  • Evasion

Customize your ship with unlockable cosmetics

Play and earn in-game money to splash on fancy cosmetics. Rocky Mayhem features a vast, colorful selection of 47 skins and a 'Limited Time Cosmetic' which rotates occasionally, featuring a constant switch up in the ship customization!
